Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class RuleAppIndex

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.RuleAppIndex
public final class RuleAppIndex extends Object
manages the possible application of rules (RuleApps)

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp tacletApp)
    adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.
    void
    addNoPosTacletApp(Iterable<NoPosTacletApp> tacletApps)
    adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.
    void
    autoModeStarted()
    Currently the rule app index can either operate in interactive mode (and contain applications of all existing taclets) or in automatic mode (and only contain a restricted set of taclets that can possibly be applied automated).
    void
    autoModeStopped()

    returns the built-in rule application index for this ruleAppIndex.

    returns a new RuleAppIndex with a copied TacletIndex.

    Ensures that all caches are fully up-to-date

    getBuiltInRules(Goal g, PosInOccurrence pos)
    returns a list of built-in rule applications applicable for the given goal, user defined constraint and position

    collects all FindTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics and position

    collects all NoFindTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics
    ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>
    getRewriteTaclet(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos)
    collects all RewriteTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics in a subterm of the constraintformula described by a PosInOccurrence
    ImmutableList<TacletApp>
    getTacletAppAt(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos, Services services)
    returns the set of rule applications for the given heuristics at the given position of the given sequent.
    ImmutableList<TacletApp>
    getTacletAppAtAndBelow(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos, Services services)
    returns the rule applications at the given PosInOccurrence and at all Positions below this.

    removeNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp tacletApp)
    remove a Taclet with instantiation information from the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.

    Report all rule applications that are supposed to be applied automatically, and that are currently stored by the index

  • Constructor Details

    • RuleAppIndex

      public RuleAppIndex(TacletIndex p_tacletIndex, BuiltInRuleAppIndex p_builtInRuleAppIndex, Goal goal, Services services)

  • Method Details

    • autoModeStarted

      public void autoModeStarted()
      Currently the rule app index can either operate in interactive mode (and contain applications of all existing taclets) or in automatic mode (and only contain a restricted set of taclets that can possibly be applied automated). This distinction could be replaced with a more general way to control the contents of the rule app index

    • autoModeStopped

      public void autoModeStopped()

    • tacletIndex

      public TacletIndex tacletIndex()
      returns the Taclet index for this ruleAppIndex.

    • builtInRuleAppIndex

      public BuiltInRuleAppIndex builtInRuleAppIndex()
      returns the built-in rule application index for this ruleAppIndex.

    • setNewRuleListener

      public void setNewRuleListener(@Nullable NewRuleListener l)
      adds a change listener to the index
      Parameters:
      l - the AppIndexListener to add

    • getTacletAppAt

      public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAt(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos, Services services)
      returns the set of rule applications for the given heuristics at the given position of the given sequent.
      Parameters:
      filter - the TacletFiler filtering the taclets of interest
      pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.

    • getTacletAppAtAndBelow

      public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos, Services services)
      returns the rule applications at the given PosInOccurrence and at all Positions below this. The method calls getTacletAppAt for all the Positions below.
      Parameters:
      filter - the TacletFiler filtering the taclets of interest
      pos - the position where to start from
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      the possible rule applications

    • getFindTaclet

      public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getFindTaclet(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all FindTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics and position
      Parameters:
      filter - the TacletFiler filtering the taclets of interest
      pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
      Returns:
      list of all possible instantiations

    • getNoFindTaclet

      public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getNoFindTaclet(TacletFilter filter, Services services)
      collects all NoFindTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics
      Parameters:
      filter - the TacletFiler filtering the taclets of interest
      services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
      Returns:
      list of all possible instantiations

    • getRewriteTaclet

      public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getRewriteTaclet(TacletFilter filter, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all RewriteTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics in a subterm of the constraintformula described by a PosInOccurrence
      Parameters:
      filter - the TacletFiler filtering the taclets of interest
      pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
      Returns:
      list of all possible instantiations

    • getBuiltInRules

      public ImmutableList<IBuiltInRuleApp> getBuiltInRules(Goal g, PosInOccurrence pos)
      returns a list of built-in rule applications applicable for the given goal, user defined constraint and position

    • addNoPosTacletApp

      public void addNoPosTacletApp(Iterable<NoPosTacletApp> tacletApps)
      adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.
      Parameters:
      tacletApps - the NoPosTacletApp describing a partial instantiated Taclet to add

    • addNoPosTacletApp

      public void addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp tacletApp)
      adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.
      Parameters:
      tacletApp - the NoPosTacletApp describing a partial instantiated Taclet to add

    • removeNoPosTacletApp

      public void removeNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp tacletApp)
      remove a Taclet with instantiation information from the Taclet Index of this TacletAppIndex.
      Parameters:
      tacletApp - the NoPosTacletApp to remove

    • sequentChanged

      public void sequentChanged(SequentChangeInfo sci)
      called if a formula has been replaced
      Parameters:
      sci - SequentChangeInfo describing the change of the sequent

    • clearAndDetachCache

      public void clearAndDetachCache()
      Empties all caches

    • clearIndexes

      public void clearIndexes()
      Empties all caches

    • fillCache

      public void fillCache()
      Ensures that all caches are fully up-to-date

    • reportAutomatedRuleApps

      public void reportAutomatedRuleApps()
      Report all rule applications that are supposed to be applied automatically, and that are currently stored by the index

    • scanBuiltInRules

      public void scanBuiltInRules(Goal p_goal)
      Report builtin rules to all registered NewRuleListener instances.
      Parameters:
      p_goal - the Goal which to scan

    • copy

      public RuleAppIndex copy(Goal goal)
      returns a new RuleAppIndex with a copied TacletIndex. Attention: the listener lists are not copied
